title: Tender Moroccan Wild Mushroom Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and umami-rich stir-fry featuring tender wild mushrooms that are perfect for young palates, baked to perfection in a nut-free-friendly dish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Rinse and slice the mushrooms into bite-sized pieces.
Mince the garlic cloves and finely chop the onion. Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and chopped onions, sauté for about 2 minutes until soft and fragrant. Add sliced mushrooms to the pan and stir fry for another 5 minutes.
Transfer the mushroom mixture into a baking dish. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until the mushrooms are tender and lightly golden on top.
Remove from the oven, let it cool down slightly before serving.
